metadata.channel_runtime_operation_specs_json: {"ack_inbound":{"label":"Ack Inbound","summary":"Acknowledge one inbound message after processing.","sample_payload":{"message_id":"demo-message"},"operator_hint":"Probe this operation with `loong plugins invoke-channel-bridge-operation --root \"<package-root>\" --plugin-id \"<plugin-id>\" --operation ack_inbound --payload '{\"message_id\":\"demo-message\"}' --allow-command <allow-command>`."},"complete_batch":{"label":"Complete Batch","summary":"Mark the current receive batch as fully processed.","sample_payload":{"batch_cursor":"cursor-1"},"operator_hint":"Probe this operation with `loong plugins invoke-channel-bridge-operation --root \"<package-root>\" --plugin-id \"<plugin-id>\" --operation complete_batch --payload '{\"batch_cursor\":\"cursor-1\"}' --allow-command <allow-command>`."},"receive_batch":{"label":"Receive Batch","summary":"Poll one inbound bridge batch for channel delivery.","sample_payload":{"limit":10},"operator_hint":"Probe this operation with `loong plugins invoke-channel-bridge-operation --root \"<package-root>\" --plugin-id \"<plugin-id>\" --operation receive_batch --payload '{\"limit\":10}' --allow-command <allow-command>`."},"send_message":{"label":"Send Message","summary":"Send one outbound bridge message for the selected channel target.","sample_payload":{"target":"weixin:contact:demo","text":"hello"},"operator_hint":"Probe this operation with `loong plugins invoke-channel-bridge-operation --root \"<package-root>\" --plugin-id \"<plugin-id>\" --operation send_message --payload '{\"target\":\"weixin:contact:demo\",\"text\":\"hello\"}' --allow-command <allow-command>`."}}
